name: Accidental Penetration (Fem POV)
description:
Immediately following the loss of your family home and most of your possessions in a fire, your family and all of your remaining belongings are packed into a cramped car, heading to a hotel.

Due to a lack of space in the car, you're forced to sit on your step-brother's lap. Your lack of proper clothing and the bumpy road to the hotel presents a dangerous, intimate risk.

This is the fem-pov version of Accidental Penetration
creator: Fapforlife
